title: Convert bottom navigation to left sidebar with icons, tooltips, and god image

requirements.text: Replace the existing BottomNav fixed bottom navigation bar with a fixed left sidebar navigation. The sidebar should display each nav item as an icon with a tooltip showing the item's name on hover. The sidebar should be narrow (icon-only) by default. Maintain the same five navigation tabs: Home, JapCount (with mala image), BhajanMarg, Dashboard, and Settings. Highlight the active page consistently with the existing spiritual theme.

quotes: bottom menu to make left side bar with icon and tooltip for name

acceptanceCriteria: The BottomNav component is replaced by a left sidebar that is fixed to the left edge of the viewport.
Each nav item displays an icon; hovering over the icon shows a tooltip with the item's name.
The active page's nav item is visually highlighted in the sidebar.
All five existing nav tabs (Home, JapCount, BhajanMarg, Dashboard, Settings) are present in the sidebar.
The main content area is offset to the right to accommodate the sidebar width.
Localized labels are used for tooltip text, consistent with existing LanguageContext usage.

requirements.text: Display the currently selected god's image in the left sidebar using object-contain styling so the full image is visible without cropping. Place it above or below the navigation icons in a dedicated image slot within the sidebar.

quotes: god image show in style is contain

acceptanceCriteria: The selected deity's image is rendered inside the left sidebar.
The image uses object-contain so the full image is visible without cropping or overflow.
The image slot has a defined size that fits within the sidebar without distorting the layout.
If no god is selected, the image slot is hidden or shows a placeholder.
The image updates when the user selects a different deity.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Preserve all existing LanguageContext translation keys and localized label usage.
Maintain the spiritual saffron/gold and deep indigo color theme in the sidebar styling.
nonGoals: Adding new navigation tabs or changing existing routing logic.
Implementing an expandable/collapsible sidebar with full label text (icon + tooltip is sufficient).
Changing backend logic or data models.
Fixing the swipe-up gesture or datepicker styling (separate features).
